title: pelargonium × polyodon
intro: Pelargonium × polyodon, also known as Rose Geranium or Pelargonium, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of geraniol and linalool, which are known for their antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × polyodon include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to reap its benefits.
